findings.detail: Pipeline flows LR with ghost gap annotations at both organisational handoffs; CONTROLS panel shows two controls side-by-side with no spurious ordering edge; dashed arrows from Approval/Rejection to both controls are legible; all colour tiers correct; subtitles readable at viewer scale.

Mermaid LR+nested-TB layout places CONTROLS top-right and PIPELINE bottom-left, leaving ~40% of the upper-left canvas empty. This is a structural Mermaid constraint for this topology — content is clear and unambiguous. Accepted as minor cosmetic.

stats.layout: flowchart LR (PIPELINE: direction TB, CONTROLS: default)
